Breaking is making its Olympic debut in Paris, marking the first time the Summer Games feature competitive dancing. B-girl Wang Qing, a PhD graduate in comparative literature and a scholar researching breaking culture, showcases the beauty of the sport and explains its emergence within Chinese pop culture.
